draws.title: Ten of Swords
draws.message: A cycle is heavy, full, or ready to transform. You may put some of it down. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Eight of Swords
draws.message: Progress is happening. Stay present with the rhythm instead of rushing the result. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: The Hanged One
draws.message: A pause is not failure. It may be the doorway to perspective.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: stop forcing and look again.

draws.title: Death
draws.message: Something can end without meaning you failed.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: let one old version of yourself rest.

draws.title: Six of Cups
draws.message: Support, memory, and restoration are available. Let care move both ways. In the realm of cups, your water medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: respond with emotional honesty and care.

draws.title: Six of Cups
draws.message: Support, memory, and restoration are available. Let care move both ways. In the realm of cups, your water medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: respond with emotional honesty and care.

draws.title: Three of Pentacles
draws.message: Something is beginning to take shape through collaboration, practice, or patience. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: The Lovers
draws.message: Love is also the courage to choose in alignment with truth.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: choose what reflects your values.

draws.title: Six of Swords
draws.message: Support, memory, and restoration are available. Let care move both ways. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Four of Swords
draws.message: Stability is asking to be tended. What supports you deserves care too. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Two of Pentacles
draws.message: Two paths are asking for your attention. Choose with your whole self, not only your fear. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: Three of Wands
draws.message: Something is beginning to take shape through collaboration, practice, or patience. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: The Hierophant
draws.message: Wisdom can be inherited, questioned, and remade.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: honor a teaching while making it humane.

draws.title: Page of Pentacles
draws.message: Beginner energy is sacred. Let curiosity open the door. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.

draws.title: Four of Wands
draws.message: Stability is asking to be tended. What supports you deserves care too. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: Wheel of Fortune
draws.message: The wheel turns. You are allowed to turn with it.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: release the need to control every outcome.

draws.title: Justice
draws.message: Clarity asks for both honesty and responsibility.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: make one choice that restores balance.

draws.title: Judgement
draws.message: A deeper call is rising through you. You do not have to ignore it.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: answer one truth you have been avoiding.
